label: Large-scale pretraining

node.label: Large-scale pretraining
node.definition: Pretraining learns broad representations or generative behavior from large, diverse corpora before task-specific adaptation or deployment.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy and feeding downstream nodes such as Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning, Parametric memory, Large language models.
examples: atlas downstream link to Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning
atlas downstream link to Parametric memory
atlas downstream link to Large language models
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has a `uses` dependency on Self-supervised learning because Self-supervised learning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy because Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Autoregressive / next-step prediction because Autoregressive / next-step prediction is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Masked prediction objectives because Masked prediction objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has a `uses` dependency on Data collection, curation & filtering because Data collection, curation & filtering is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has a `uses` dependency on Empirical scaling laws because Empirical scaling laws is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has a `uses` dependency on Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization because Learning-rate schedules, warmup & stabilization is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Large-scale pretraining has a `uses` dependency on Regularization, dropout & weight decay because Regularization, dropout & weight decay is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
